caption: A screen recording displays a webpage for CaseBreaks.com, featuring a baseball card break listing. The listing is titled "RNB FOR 2023 MUSEUM BASEBALL 6BOX PYT #2: ANGELS DODGERS WHITE SOX PIRATES BREWERS ROCKIES GUARDIANS NATIONALS RAYS" and lists a price of "$59.99." To the left of the text is an image of a Shohei Ohtani card featuring him in a Dodgers jersey. Below the listing, a "SOLD OUT" button is visible. A chat window on the right shows messages from "engaged" and "Nightbot," including the text "I think if you are a team signing Ohtani, you are going all in on everyone you can" and a link for the "BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE." At the bottom of the screen, a small video window shows a man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt. Throughout the sequence, the page remains static with no movement or changes in the layout.
